title: russelia cora
intro: Russelia cora, also known as Firecracker Plant, is a flowering evergreen shrub native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The Russelia cora plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea or used in herbal remedies, and its leaves and stems are also used to make a decoction for treating various health issues.
